creator: truckman@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 164944
patch to change devel/libxs to USE_GITHUB  cand unbreak

The MASTER_SITE download.crossroads.io no longer exists and libxs has been marked BROKEN because the distfile is unfetchable.  Change the port to USE_GITHUB=yes and unmark BROKEN.  Comparing the old and new tarballs does not reveal any changes to the source.  The new tarball now contains .gitignore, .hgeol, and README.asciidoc.  The new tarball is missing the man pages and html docs, Changelog, and the files generated by the autotools.  The latter requires the addition of USES=autoreconf, which in turn requires patches to be applied to some files at an earlier stage.

Switch to INSTALL_TARGET=install-strip to silence a stage-qa warning.
